verses.text: Khaldea mite' gamsungah a om Babylon khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei tungah a hong gen hi

“Gam khempeuhah genin taangko un la, dial khai un la im kei un. ‘Babylon khuapi kia ta hi. Bel pasian maizum ta a, Merodak pasian kitan gawpta hi. A milimte uh maizum ta a, a pasian-te uh kisiagawp ta hi,’ ci-in taangko un
“Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin Babylon gam a sim ding leh gamlak a suaksak dingin gam khat hong pai ding hi. Gamsungah kuamah tenglo ding a, a mihing a ganhingin a taimang ding uh hi
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni tua hun ciangin Israel mite leh Judah mite kap kawmin hong paikhawm ding uh a, Topa a Pasian uh hong zong ding uh hi
Zion khua lampi a dong ding uh a, tua khua lam maingatin, ‘Hong pai un. A kimangngilh ngei nawnlo ding tawntung thuciamna khat Topa' tungah ciamkhawm dih ni,’ a ci ding uh hi
“Ka mite tuu mangthang bang ahi khin uh hi. Makai tuucingte in mualtung tengah lamkhialin a gamman'pih uh hi. Mual khat panin mual khatah a pai kawikawi uh a, a giahna inn uh a thei nawn kei uh hi
Amau a mute in na ne gawp uh hi. A galte un, ‘Ko bangmah khialhna ka nei kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pute a pate un a muan' leh a lametna uh Topa' tungah amaute a khial uh hi,’ a ci uh hi
“Israel mite aw, Babylon khuapi pan taikhia un. Khaldea gam panin paikhia un. Keelhon laka keeltal bangin a paikhia masa ding kituh un

Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, keimah in leilu lam panin gam pawlkhat ka hanthawn ding a, Babylon ka simsak ding hi. Amaute in Babylon khua kimkotah gal pangin tua khua a la ding uh hi. Galkap siamte' lot bangin a thaltangte un khakloh a nei kei uh hi
Khaldea gam kiluhgawp ding a, Topa in kong cihin-ah, a luh khempeuh in a lungkim dong uh a la ding uh hi
“Babylon mite aw, note in keima gamh Israel mite na luhgawp uh hi. Lungdamin kipakin, lopa kham bawngno bangin omin sakol bangin na ham uh hangin
na nu uh Babylon khuapi maizum ding a, note' pian'na na nu uh a mindai ding hi. En un, na gam uh gam khempeuh lakah a ginalo pen hi ding a, lei keu, gamlak, sehnel gam a suak ding hi
Topa' hehna hangin kuamah tenglo ding a, gamlakpi a suak ding hi. Babylon khua a kantan mi khempeuh in lamdangsa-in khuapi siatna hangin zahko-in a phitsan ding uh hi
“No thal tawite khempeuh aw, Babylon khua a sim dingin a kimkotah gal pang un. Thaltang khat beek sitloin kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' tungah a khialzo uh hi

Khuapi a sim dingin a kimkotah awng un. Babylon khuapi in note hong lel khinzo hi. A galdalte uh cim khin a, a kulhte uh puk khinta hi. Hih pen Topa' phulakna ahih manin, amau' tungah phu la un. Midangte tungah a bawl bangin amau' tungah zong bawl un
Babylon khua-ah khaici tuhte thatlum un la, anla dingin phiaukawi a tawite beisak un. Galte' namsau kihta-in mi khempeuh in a mipihte' lak mah uh zuankik ciatin a gam mah uhah a taikik ding uh hi
“Israel mite, humpinelkai in a delhmang tuu tawh a kibang uh hi. A masa-in Assiria kumpipa in ne a, tu-in a tawpna-ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a guh dongin a teeptum hi
Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: En un, Assiria kumpipa gim ka piak bangmahin Babylon kumpipa leh a gam ka thuaksak ding hi
Israel mite a omnasa mun mahah ka omsak kik ding a, Karmel leh Bashan mual, Efraim mual leh Gilead mualah a piang ante lungkim takin a ne ding uh hi

Tua ni hun ciangin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel gamah khialhna kizong ding a, a kimu kei ding hi. Judah gamah mawhna kizong ding a, a kimu tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntaksak, ka nusiatlai mite a mawhna uh ka maisak ding hi
“Merathaim gam a sim dingin pai un la, Pekod mite zong va sim un. That un la a vekpi-in sumang un, Topa in kong ci hi. Kong sawl khempeuh hih un
Gamsungah galsimna aw kiza a, na tampi kisia hi
Leitung khempeuh sekpi bangin a satkham Babylon khuapi, tu-in tua sekpi kitanin kitamta hi. Gamdangte' lakah tu-in Babylon khuapi a mulkimhuai a suak ta hi
Babylon khua aw, nang thang kong siah a, theilo na hih manin na awk pah hi. Topa langpang na hih manin nang hong kimu-in hong kiman hi
Topa in a galhiam koihna hongkhiazo a, a hehna galhiamte a lakhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon gamah Vanglian Topa Pasian in sep ding khat a nei hi
Mun khempeuh panin hong sim un la, a ansal uh hon'sak un. An cian' bangin amaute ciang un. A vekpi-in susia un la, bangmah nusiat kei un
A galkap hangte khempeuh uh thahsak un. Amaute in gimna thuak ding uh a, a thuak ni ding uh hong tungzo ta
(Ngai dih un. Topa i Pasian' thuhkikna, ama biakinnpi hangin a phulakna thu Zion khua-ah a taangko dingin Babylon gam panin ka mite suakta-in a tai uh hi

“Babylon khua a sim dingin thalkap siam, thaltawi theite va sam un. Khuapi umcih un la, kuamah suaktasak kei un. Ama hihna tawh kituakin ama tungah hih un. Ama hih ngei bangmahin ama tungah bawl un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kisathei-in Topa ahi, Israel mite' Siangtho Pa a simmawh hi
Tua ahih manin khuasung laizangah a tangvalte uh si ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin a galkapte uh a beimang khin ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi
En in, a Vanglian Topa Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Nang a kisathei Babylon aw, nang kong langpan' hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang gim kong piak hun ding na ni hong tungzo ta hi
A kisathei gam hoi-in tuk ding a, kuamah in a phongto kei ding hi. A khuapite mei tawh ka hal ding a, a kiima om khempeuh a kangtum ding hi
“Vanglian Topa in kong genin-ah: Israel mite leh Judah mite in netniamna thuak uh a, sal dingin a paipih mite in lencipin a ciahsakkik nawn kei uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute a honkhiapa hat mahmah a, Vanglian Topa kici hi. Amah in leitungah kilemna a omna ding leh Babylon mite in gimna a ngahna dingin, amaute-a' dingin a sem ding hi
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah, Khaldea gammite, Babylon khua-ah a tengte, a kumpi uliante leh a mipilte namsau tawh kithat ta hen
Kamsang zuau mihaite namsau tawh kithat ta hen! A meidawi a galkapte namsau tawh kithat ta hen
Sakolte leh sakol leengte, numei tawh a kibang lel a galkap cialte uh, namsau tawh kithat ta hen! A sum a paai khempeuh uh, kituahmang ta hen
Guah zu kei hen la, a gunte uh kang ta hen! Bang hang hiam cih leh milim biakna gam hi a, milimte a hailawh uh hi
“Tua ahih manin gamsate leh se-alte Babylon khua-ah teng ding uh a, vasa-kalaohte zong a teng ding uh hi. A khang a khangin, a tawntungin mi kuamah a teng ngei nawn kei ding hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua, leh a kiima khuate, Pasian in a suksiat bangin tua lai-ah kuamah a teng kei ding a, kuamah zong a va baang pak beek kei ding hi
“En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, gam lian khat leh kumpi tampi leimong gamla pek panin galsim dingin kithawithawi uh hi
A thal uh leh a teipi uh tawi uh a, gilo mahmahin hehpihna lungsim neilo uh hi. A husa uh tuipi ging bang a, sakol tungah tuang uh hi. Babylon mite aw, note a hong simgawp dingin hong kithawi uh hi
Babylon kumpipa in tua thu za khinzo a, bangmah a cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamin lumcip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na a sa hi

“En un, lonona-ah nuamtakin a om tuute, Jordan gam tulak panin a hong paito humpinelkai in a delhmang bangin a gam uh nusia-in thakhat thu-in amaute ka taimangsak ding a, a gam uh a uk dingin ka deih peuhpeuh ka seh ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei bang mi kua om ahi hiam? Ka to ding kua omlai ahi hiam? Ka mai-ah kua kumpi hong ding ngam ding ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin Babylon khuapi' thuak ding leh Khaldea gam' gimna dingin Topa' geelna leh ngimnate ngai dih un. A ta ngekte nangawn uh kikaikhia takpi ding a, mi khempeuh a lau taktak ding uh hi
A pukna uh gin' ngaihlua ahih manin leitung a kiling ding hi. A kahna aw uh gam khempeuhah a kiza ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
